indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and takes up a significant portion of the room, leaving limited space for computer work.

indicators.name: counter
indicators.rationale: There is a counter available for placing a computer and other work-related items.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor is clean and provides a stable surface for standing or sitting.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a bed taking up a significant amount of space, but it has a counter and a wooden floor that can be used for work.
